Item.title: Item
Item.description: Represents a lost or found item tracked by FindTrack

userId.description: The identifier of the user who registered the item

type.description: Whether the item is lost or was found

title.description: The name or brief title of the item

location.description: Where the item was lost or found

imageUrl.description: Optional image URL or base64 representation of the item portrait

contactName.description: Name of the key point of contact

contactInfo.description: Phone number, email, or messaging handle for contact

date.description: Date and time when the item was lost or found

createdAt.description: Server timestamp when item was created

Match.title: Match
Match.description: Represents a potential or confirmed match between a lost item and a found item

lostItemId.description: Reference field to the lost item

foundItemId.description: Reference field to the found item

confidenceScore.description: The match score calculated by the AI engine or heuristic (0 to 100)

matchReason.description: Descriptive reason why these two items are a match

updatedAt.description: Server timestamp of last status update

Chat.title: Chat
Chat.description: Represents an interactive chat conversation between users

participants.description: List of user UIDs participating in this convo

itemId.description: Reference field to the lost or found item

lastMessage.description: The text of the last sent message

timestamp.description: Server timestamp of the last message update

Message.title: Message
Message.description: Represents a message sent within a chat session

senderId.description: The UID of the user sending the message

text.description: The textual body of the message

createdAt.description: Server timestamp when the message was sent

/items/{itemId}.description: Collection of all lost and found items

/matches/{matchId}.description: Collection of tracked item matches between lost and found items

/chats/{chatId}.description: Collection of all direct message chats between users

/chats/{chatId}/messages/{messageId}.description: Subcollection of all messages within a specific chat session
